reviews.comment:
Disappointing experience.
The staff is not well trained and doesn't know much about the menu. The ice cream price listing is a pure loot - they serve it by the grams and not by the scoop.
The coffee was terrible to say the least.
It was past 11 PM and having many tables occupied, the staff was baffled and could not cope up with orders.
Also the place had a very unpleasant stinking smell.
Definitely not visiting again.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi Divya,

We’ve taken careful note of your feedback and have shared it with our team for review. Consistency in service, product knowledge, and maintaining a comfortable café environment are all things we continuously work on improving.

If you’re open to sharing more about your visit, please feel free to DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly. ☕

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/6119222168702984294/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT21WdFdHRTJhVVZKYkRBNU5IcGlUalJpVUROdGJsRRAB

reviews.comment: We ordered chicken jalapeno flatbread, but they served plain flatbread. When we brought to the server's attention, he agreed that it was wrong order but never apologized and took the plate and guess what, rebaked same flatbread after sprinkling some chicken on top. Because of baking twice, The dough was so hard that we could not manage to eat it. Offered replacement again, We ended up cancelling the order. We understand there was rush on a busy evening but don't expect any customer service or consideration about the food. Only coffee was good.

reviewReply.comment:
Hi,

This is not the experience we want to deliver. We’ve taken careful note of your feedback regarding the order mix-up and the way it was handled, and it has been shared with our team as we review our kitchen and service processes.

It’s good to know you enjoyed the coffee, and we hope to make the overall experience much better next time. If you’re open to sharing more about your visit, please feel free to DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or email us at hello@coffeeisland.in so we can connect directly. ☕

reviews.name: accounts/100486096577551952970/locations/6119222168702984294/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2xodE5tSkZiMjQ1Wm5BNU1raGlkMFkxYVV4bkxWRRAB

reviews.comment:
As a regular customer of Coffee Island, I am very disappointed with my recent experiences at the store. The staff often seem frustrated while working, which creates an uncomfortable environment for customers. It feels like the management is not handling things properly.

The food quality has also gone down compared to earlier. Additionally, there appears to be very low manpower, which results in delayed orders almost every time.
Overall, the store management seriously needs to improve operations, increase staff support, and focus on timely service. As a regular customer, I hope these issues are addressed soon.

reviews.comment:
If i am paying 300 bucks for a coffee atleast i expect a good presentation they gave me in a takeaway glass which was 1/4th empty!! .. i ordered vietnamese shakerito and it was really mid in taste .

Other than that the ambience was nice .
